description: Number of active variables and columns of the mapping matrix
Number of rows of the mapping matrix
Number of nonzero matrix entries; its presence selects sparse storage
Nonzero count per row; required for non-identity sparse matrices
Column index of each sparse matrix entry
Dense or sparse matrix values; required for nonempty mappings except an implicit sparse identity
Constant vector; zero is assumed when absent
Affected constraint side; both sides are assumed when absent
Paths to affected row constraints; required when NumRow is greater than zero
Inner optimization block or indirect block reference
